titleStmt.title: SII 18.242: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 242. (B.K. No. 102 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab to the left of Gaṇēśa temple.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Vīra-Kandharadēva. Except Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, the other details of the date are lost.

It states that Chāmuṇḍarāya who was a subordinate of the king and was governing from his capital Puligere revived the grant of the agrahāra town of Hāvēri apparently to the mahājanas of that place. The grant is stated to have been formerly protected by the Hoysaḷa emperor Ballāḷa but later on it lapsed owing to the activities of unrighteous persons. From the context it appears that the inscription records the tradition that the agrahāra town of Hāvēri was founded by the mythical king Naḷa and also a tank was constructed therein by him. It seems that the town was called Naḷapuri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . muramukhasuraśatrūn līlayā yō
vijitya praṇatabudhajanānāṁ kīrttilakṣmīṁ tanōti . haraṇabharaṇaśaktyā rōṣakōpakriyā yāṁ jayati bhuvi viśāḷaṁ śāsanaṁ sāraṁgapā
ṇēḥ . śrīmatkaṁdharacakravartti jasamaṁ viśvaṁbharābhāgadoḷprēmaṁ prārtthijanaṁgaḷo ḷvacanamaṁ naiyāyikānīkadoḷu . kṣēmaṁ bā
hulatāvṛtāvaniyoḷaṁ vīrāriyoḷvīramaṁ bhūmīśaṁ sale baṇṇisalneṟadapaṁ prauḍhapratā pōdayaṁ . satataṁ saṁgarasaṁmu
khāritatiyiṁ sākṣēpakaukṣēyadiṁ śaradāghāti vibhūtijōgiṇiyaraṁ saṁtōṣadiṁda rccipaṁ nutaballāḷtanadiṁ saritpari
vṛtōrvvīcakramaṁ pāḷipōnnatalakṣmīpati kaṁdharāvanipanī prakhyātiyiṁ raṁjipaṁ . jētārikṣitipāḷara praṇataraṁ māḷpa
ṁtā sauryyōdayaṁ sārāsāravicāravastuviṣayaṁ bhūtaprabōdhōdayaṁ . bhūristōtrapavitraraṁ ta
ṇipuvāgaṇyōrupuṇyōdayaṁ vīrōdāttateyiṁda kaṁdharanripaṁ bhūcakramaṁ rakṣipaṁ . va . svasti śrī
matkaṁdharacakravarttiya vikramaṁ baṇnipaḍe cāgadēḷgeyiṁ bhāskarasutanudayisidaneṁ baṁte . bhōgabhāgyadodavi
noḷu lōkādhipaṁ lōkadoḷavatarisidaneṁbaṁte . vīrarasātirēkasu ka bhūbhujaṁ bhujabaḷadiṁdiḷāvaḷeyamaṁ pāḷipaṁ
te . satataṁ satyavākyadoḷabhinavayudhiṣṭhiranaṁte . ṁbudhi pōrvvītaḷamanāḷvādyacakrigaḷa caritamananukarisuvaṁ
tēkacchatradiṁ kṣatrācāramaṁ meṟadu bhūmiyaṁ rakṣisuvanā vīrāritamastōmatira skaraṇabhāskaranaṁte tējōmayanuṁ . pra
jēṁdīvaranikurāṁbōdbhōdamaṁ māḷpa sudhāsūtiyaṁte vāgamṛtamayaniṁtu samastapraśastisamadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda
mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ . dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷa pratāpacakravartti vīrakaṁdharadēva vijayarāThe letter va is written above the line.
jyōttarābhiv®ddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrarkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpa jīvi . v® . śrīmatkaṁdharacakri sauryyapadamaṁ koṭṭiṁ mahōtsāThe letters v®ddhi are written below the line.
hadiṁdā mārāṁta virōdhibhūpatigaḷaṁ nirmmūḷamaṁ māḍu [nīṁ .] bhūmīśa ṁ sale dakṣiṇāvaniyoḷēṁ vīrvvaṭṭamaṁ kaṭṭidaṁ sōmārkkaṁbarakī
rttiyaṁ beḷagu nīṁ śrīcauṁḍadaṁḍādhipa . bharadiṁ kaṁdharabhūbhujaṁge raṇadoḷ saṁnāharūpaṁ manōharanartthāgamadoḷu niyōganipuṇaṁ
dēśaprajāpūrttiyoḷu . sarasaṁ kābyakaḷāpragalbhateyoḷaṁ maṁtrāṁgadoḷu kāraṇaṁ sthira[mō?]haṁ prabhu cauṁḍaneṁdaḍivanēṁ puṇyādhikaṁ
lōkadoḷu . sōmēśaṁ kuladēvanātana satī raṁbhōru lakhkhāṁbike svāmi śrīpati kaṁdharakṣitipati śrībīcirājaṁ pitaṁ . prēmaṁgitta suta
pramōdanesedaṁ śrīcauṁḍadaṁḍādhipaṁ tāṁ mallātmajaneṁdu baṇniparidēṁ puṇyaṁ karaṁ celvanō . Anatārikṣitipāḷaraṁ haripeneṁbī cauṁḍanaṁ
kāṇbuduṁ vinayaṁ māḍade kaigaḷaṁ mugiyadēṁ svārtthaṁgaḷaṁ vastravāhana saṁdōhamanīyadāḷtanadi jīyeṁdeṁnnadārddainyadiṁ banamaṁ biṭṭidirāṁ
tu jīvisuvarārllōkadoḷu . yenasuṁ bāseyanāṁtu baṁdarinṛpaughaṁ nuṁguvā rāhuvō muḷisiṁ
dāṁta virōdhibhūpatigaḷaṁ kittettuvā hunumanō . mone muṁtāgi padārppi tārikuḷamaṁ tāṁ pāḷipā rāmanō ghanasauryyaprabhu cauṁḍa
rāyanivanō vairībhavajāṁkuśaṁ . mattaṁ svasti śrīmatu prasiddhaprabaḷapradhānakarikaḷa bhayūthanāthanuṁ . kavigamakivādivāgmividvajjanasa
nāthanuṁ . pratyartthi pracaṁḍadaṁḍanāthapratativanabhaṁjanāṁjanēyanuṁ . kadanakarkkasaripu nṛpasaṁpaṁnapannagavainatēyanum . samaravi
rōdhi lāṭabhaṭaniṭaḷataṭaghaṭitākṣaranighaṭanadakṣanuṁ karakaravāḷanirgghātasaṁpātanirjjita pratipakṣanuṁ kalahakēḷikutū
haḷakhaḷabaḷajaḷadapracaṁḍāniḷanuṁ . [Aśēṣōru]kṣitipāḷakuḷajaḷadhibaḍavānaḷanuṁ . Amitra gōtragōtraśaiḷasahasrakhaṁḍanaśatadhāradharanuṁ . pracaṁḍa
maṁḍaḷikadōrddaṁḍamuraharaṇacakradharanuṁ . darppiṣṭhapratiṣṭhavidyuṣṭasubhaṭa puratripuratriṇētranuṁ . śubhasēnasūriprabhṛtipaṁḍitajanavinutacaritranuṁ
sarasakavivarṇnitaṁ cauṣaṣṭhikaḷākaḷāpacaturmmukhanuṁ . vīravairibhūbhujabrajakrauṁca ṣaṇmukhanuṁ . catussamayaṣaḍdarśana samu
ddharaṇapariṇatāṁtaḥkaraṇanuṁ . dīnānāthasādhubudhajanasvāśritāśābharaṇanuṁ . prabhu maṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayāḷaṁkritāśā
bhyaṁtarīkṛtasamsāranuṁ . samastāmātyōttaṁśībhūtamudrāmātyanaṁte svī kārasāranuṁ . patihitācaraṇadoḷakhiḷaniyōgayōgaṁdharāya
(ṁ)ṇanuṁ . cāturyyavācaspatiyaṁte sāhityavidyāpārāyaṇanuṁ . śrīmatkaṁdhara dēvadvijagurupādārādhakanuṁ . parabaḷasādhakanu
mappa śrīmaccāmuṁḍarāyanuṁ samasta birudanāmāvaḷigaḷiṁdaḷaṁkṛtanāgi puli gereya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire . dhuradoḷu durddhararāyara prasaramaṁ tūḷdāḍuvā līleyiṁ dhare yoḷu dharmmavinōdadiṁ tribhuvanaprakhyātavikhyātiyiṁ .
paramagrāmataṭākamaṁ besasidaṁ lōkōttamaṁ prēmadiṁ naranāthaṁ naḷacakravartti viḷasatkalpāṁtakīrttipriyaṁ . svāmyamātyasuhṛ
tkōśadēśadurggabalameṁba saptāṁgasaṁpattiyoḷadvitīyanenisiyuṁ dvitīyanaḷa cakravartti digbaḷa bhūcakradoḷu vikramadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddu hā
variyeṁba mahāgrahāramaṁ māḍi yaṣṭatējasāmya palavu paḷḷi sahita dhārā pūrvvakaṁ māḍida nānūrvvara māhātmeyeṁteṁdoḍe . © .
v® . vēdārtthakramamaṁtratatvaniratarnnānākaḷākōvidarvvidyābhūṣitapaṁḍita pratatiyaṁ sanmānadiṁdarcciparu . dōrddaṁḍārijanaughamaṁ muṟiya
luṁ pratyēka vīradhvajar prōdyadvaṁdikadaṁbamaṁ taṇisaluṁ prakhyātanāṁnūrvvaru . brahmāvāsamaśēṣavēdaniḷayaṁ vidyādharairāvṛtaṁ pṛthvīThe letter ka is written below the line.
maṁḍaḷamaṁḍanaṁ naḷapurīrājadvijānāṁ mahatprakhyātapratibhāparapravibudha prāmāṇikaprāsnikaprastutyaṁ prativāsarapratimu
huḥ prōdyatsabhāmaṁḍaḷaṁ . sadbhōgōragavārivāraṇaghaṭīdurvvrittadūrīkṛtē rājatkīrtticatuśśatadvijatatē śuṁbhatsabhāmaṁḍaḷaṁ . vākkāṁtā
kulamaṁdiraṁ sukhavahaṁ vāgbhāminībhūṣaṇaṁ vāgmukhyāmukhanūtnaratnamukuraṁ vāgvaibhavaṁ śōbhatē . svasti yamaniyamasvā
dhyāyajapahōmasamādhiśīlaguṇanirataruṁ . sarvvadā sarvvajanaparōpakāracaritaruṁ . vēdavēdāntasmṛtipurāṇamana�nidhi
dhyāsanātmajñānaniyatacittaruṁ . samadārimadaharaṇārttipōṣaṇadhīrōdāttaruṁ . nyāyamīmāṁsaśāstrasaṁdarbhbhavivēkaviḷāsa
ruṁ . vāgvanitāvinōdariṁtu nānūrvvara yōgyatābaladiṁ . sāpānugrahasamarttha teyiṁ . paraṁparāgatamappagrahāramaṁ pū
rvvamaryyādeyiṁdā hōśśaṇacakravartti ballāḷabhūpa naḍasuttamire baḷikkadu duṣṭakaṣṭara deseyiṁdaṁtarisida dharmmamaṁ punarū
rjjitaṁ māḍaludyatanādaṁ . vṛtta hētubhūtanenipaṁ śrīcauṁḍa daṁḍādhipaṁ kṣitiyoḷu dēvanikētanaprakaramaṁ
puṇyaprapāśatramaṁ . satataṁ maṁgaḷaṁ māḷpeneṁdu padapiṁ
dittaṁ punarddattiyaṁ . vatsaraduttarāyaṇa saṁkrā
ntiyoḷu geṟeyaṁ śrī rāya nārāya
rige mattarvvaṇamaṁ dhā
deṁdu ballāḷana
doḷu sā
nṛpā
Inti
peeled off
putrapautrābhivṛddhi
śrī śrī śrī Ōṁ namaḥ śrīśubhasēnāya
Digital edition of SII 18.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
